title: Step 1: Trace forward to find a wall / object the character cannot walk on.
comment: Step 1: Trace forward to find a wall / object the character cannot walk on.
terms: Step 1: Trace forward to find a wall / object the character cannot walk on.

title: Step 2: Trace downward from the first trace's Impact Point and determine if the hit location is walkable.
comment: Step 2: Trace downward from the first trace's Impact Point and determine if the hit location is walkable.
terms: Step 2: Trace downward from the first trace's Impact Point and determine if the hit location is walkable.

title: Step 3: Check if the capsule has room to stand at the downward trace's location. If so, set that location as the Target Transform and calculate the mantle height.
comment: Step 3: Check if the capsule has room to stand at the downward trace's location. If so, set that location as the Target Transform and calculate the mantle height.

title: Step 5: If everything checks out, start the Mantle
comment: Step 5: If everything checks out, start the Mantle
terms: Step 5: If everything checks out, start the Mantle

title: Step 4: Determine the Mantle Type by checking the movement mode and Mantle Height.
comment: Step 4: Determine the Mantle Type by checking the movement mode and Mantle Height.
terms: Step 4: Determine the Mantle Type by checking the movement mode and Mantle Height.
